name: Fido's Favorite Treats
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 10
1. In a large bowl, pour hot water over oatmeal, margarine, and bouillon granules. Let stand for 5 minutes.
2. Stir in powdered milk, cornmeal, and egg. Mix well.
3. Gradually add flour, 1/2 cup at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition. Knead the dough for 3 to 4 minutes, adding more flour if needed to achieve a very stiff consistency.
4. Roll the dough to a thickness of about 1/2 inch. Cut into bone shapes and place on a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake in an oven set to 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes. Allow treats to cool and dry completely before serving. Makes approximately 1 3/4 pounds.
